violations.text: 2 dead rodents were observed in the facility. One was observed in the middle of the floor of the bar and one was observed on a glue trap behind the hostess stand. Dead rodents were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodents and new droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the container holding cornstarch have small accumulation of rodent droppings. Droppings were cleaned at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The floor in the corners of kitchen area has an accumulation of old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Per PIC, floors will be cleaned fully. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
Allergy statement was lacking on dessert menus. Per manager, allergy statement will be pasted on menus. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by new droppings in bar and kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving near dry goods have a small accumulation of rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The floor in the corner of the kitchen near the dry goods and bar area has a small accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
An allergy statement is lacking on the dessert menu and 25$ menu. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by new droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of multiple shelves with pots and containers and the unused hand sink in the bar have an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The floors in various spots in the kitchen, employee storage area, and in the corner/in the wall of the bar have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
A gap was observed in the bar wall in the corner near the hand sink. Gap to be sealed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
An allergy statement is lacking on the dessert menu and 25$ menu. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The presence of pest is not controlled as evidenced by dead mouse on trap and droppings throughout the floors of the kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The receptacle in the kitchen/unisex toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
The grout near the ice machine was observed in poor repair. Water was observed pooling in worn down grout. Grout to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
The floors throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
Allergy statement was lacking on special menus. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
An allergy statement is lacking on each menu. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

Red sauce, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Sauce was prepped yesterday and was observed above 60 degrees. PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Sauce was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. PIC stated ice bath was used but may have been pulled before full cooling process was achieved. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Cooling chart provided. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
The walk-in door is not tight fitting. Gap was observed on the bottom of the door. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay and dish washer. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

The ice machine is lacking an air gap (air break.) A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
The wall in the kitchen bathroom area is in poor repair (hole next to ice machine). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
